mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pp.point_amount), 0) AS totalPoints FROM performance_point pp WHERE pp.performance_employee_id = #{employeeId}

SELECT pp.performance_point_id AS performancePointId, pp.point_type AS pointType, pp.point_amount AS pointAmount, pp.point_earned_date AS pointEarnedDate, pp.point_description AS pointDescription, pp.point_source_type AS pointSourceType FROM performance_point pp WHERE pp.performance_employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY pp.point_earned_date DESC, pp.created_at DESC
